description: Composition:Yellow round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitSummer's all about fun and frolic. Grab the attention of passers by in this cheeky tee from tantra and see the smile brighten their face. After all, it's all about spreading joy.Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
